morning.title: Ornn raises $33M for GPU capacity marketplace
morning.summary: Ornn has raised $33M for its marketplace that allows trading of GPU capacity.

morning.title: XCures raises $46M for AI-powered patient data
morning.summary: XCures has raised $46M for its AI-powered patient data and medical records platform.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM has acquired Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
morning.summary: OpenAI has unveiled its first custom chip, built by Broadcom, for AI inference.

morning.title: Alibaba's AI video model rises to No. 2 in global rankings
morning.summary: Alibaba's AI video model has risen to No. 2 in global rankings, surpassing OpenAI's Sora and ByteDance's Seedance.

morning.title: The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer for AI
morning.summary: The web data infrastructure layer for AI is emerging, enabling more efficient AI model training and deployment.

morning.title: Stripe, Anthropic and OpenAI are backing an effort to stop respiratory infections
morning.summary: Stripe, Anthropic, and OpenAI are backing an effort to stop respiratory infections using AI and data analytics.

morning.title: Microsoft's Digital Crimes Unit uses AI to take down hacking tools
morning.summary: Microsoft's Digital Crimes Unit has used AI to link two separate hacking tools and take them down.

morning.title: Chinese cybersecurity company 360 unveils new AI tools
morning.summary: Chinese cybersecurity company 360 has unveiled new AI tools, including Tulongfeng and Yitianzhen, for cyber defense.

morning.title: Intuit will show off its rebuilt AI infrastructure at VB Transform 2026
morning.summary: Intuit will showcase its rebuilt AI infrastructure at VB Transform 2026, highlighting its support for fast and complex tasks.

gym.summary: This tutorial provides a comprehensive guide on how to run ChatGPT ads.

gym.summary: This video explains how individuals may be richer than they think, from an accountant's perspective.

gym.title: What happens after coding is solved?
gym.summary: This podcast episode explores the potential consequences and implications of coding being 'solved'.

gym.title: AI on campus
gym.summary: This video discusses the applications and potential of AI on college campuses.
